title: A measurement contract for decidable route-closure claims in lunar regolith construction: reproducibility package

creators.name: Ren, Lijian
creators.affiliation: Inner Mongolia University of Technology; Hohai University

description: Public reproducibility package for the Acta Astronautica candidate manuscript A measurement contract for decidable route-closure claims in lunar regolith construction. The archive contains derived coordinate-contract tables, open-access census and screening logs, consequentiality audit outputs, worked-example outputs, constructed witness-register files, figure exports and scripts. It excludes active submission manuscripts, submission PDFs and LaTeX packages, cover letters, reviewer-response drafts, internal rounds/logs, raw third-party data, credentials, and private author/funding files.
